Interface IMapTableInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Table Info.

[Guid("2A3BAAEA-F8FF-4BF2-9515-D64077644AA2")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMapTableInfo2

Properties

DisplayField

Primary display field.

string DisplayField { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Fields

Array of attribute fields contained in the table.

IFields Fields { get; }

IFields

Sample Snippet

HTMLPopupType

Indicates if the layer has HTML popups enabled.

esriServerHTMLPopupType HTMLPopupType { get; }

Property Value

esriServerHTMLPopupType

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasAttachments

Indicates if the layer has attachments.

bool HasAttachments { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasSubtype

Indicates if the layer has Subtype.

bool HasSubtype { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

The table ID. This is a unique ID among layers and tables, and is used to identify the table in a number of methods.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Descriptive name of the table.

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OIDFieldName

The name of the OID Field.

string OIDFieldName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelateInfos

Array of relates associated to the table.

IRelateInfos RelateInfos { get; }

Property Value

IRelateInfos

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsAdvancedQueries

Indicates if the table supports calculating advanced queries (i.e. ORDER BY clauses) on its fields.

bool SupportsAdvancedQueries { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsStatistics

Indicates if the table supports calculating statistics on its fields.

bool SupportsStatistics { get; }

Property Value

bool

Returns the original definition expression on the layer.
